---
output: hugodown::md_document
title: "Scopes"
date: 2020-04-03
trailer: "gallery/scopes/preview/scope_06_272.png"
splash:
  image: "gallery/scopes/image/scope_06_272.png"
  caption: "Scopes"
---

<style>
.splash-caption-tweak{
 color: #000000;
 letter-spacing: 6px;
}
</style>


```{r include=FALSE}
source("../../diziet.R")
```

>"I know who I was when I got up this morning,<br>but I think I must have been changed several times since then"<br>(Lewis Carroll)

```{r echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
diziet$make_gallery()
```
